name: Wild Blackberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups washed and well drained blackberries
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the pastry dough, sift together 1 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Cut in 1/2 cup butter or margarine until crumbly. Gradually add boiling water to form a ball.
2. Roll out two crusts on a lightly floured surface.
3. In a bowl, combine sugar, 3 tablespoons flour, cinnamon, and 1/8 teaspoon salt with the blackberries. Spread this mixture in the prepared pie crust.
4. Add lemon juice and dot with butter or margarine.
5. Fit and seal the upper crust.
6. Bake on the lower shelf of a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 30 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown. Makes one nine-inch pie.
